title: TaskCard
description: A typed task card dispatched by A00 Supervisor to implementation agents. Enforces timeout budgets, non-interactive execution requirements, and output artifact contracts.

task_id.description: Unique task identifier (e.g., TASK-API-AUTH). Used for routing, logging, and deduplication.

owner_agent.description: The agent responsible for executing this task.

trace_id.description: Must match GlobalState.trace_id. Enables distributed tracing continuity across all generated artifacts.

stage.description: Must match the stage values used in GlobalState.current_stage.

goal.description: Clear, unambiguous task objective. Must specify what artifact must be produced.

input_refs.description: File paths or artifact URIs the agent must read before starting. Agent MUST verify these exist before executing SOP.

output_schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema or artifact type expected as output (e.g., 'contracts/agent-spec.schema.json', 'OpenAPI 3.0 YAML').

acceptance_tests.description: Explicit, testable conditions that must be true before the agent can submit a HandoffEnvelope. All must be verifiable without human intervention.

priority.description: P0: Execute immediately, block all else. P1: Execute in current stage. P2: Schedule within iteration. P3: Advisory.

timeout_seconds.description: REQUIRED. Maximum allowed wall-clock time for this task's execution. Per-category defaults: install=120, build=180, test=300, migrate=60, scan=90, probe=30. Agent MUST set a timer and emit HandoffEnvelope(handoff_type='circuit_breaker') on breach.

require_non_interactive.description: REQUIRED. When true, all terminal commands executed for this task MUST include non-interactive flags (--yes, -y, --no-input, CI=true, etc.).

output_log_file.description: Optional. Named log file pattern for redirecting CLI stdout/stderr (e.g., '{trace_id}_{task_id}.log'). Agent reads only tail-50 to prevent context overflow.

deadline.description: Optional ISO 8601 absolute deadline. If present and exceeded, A00 may deprioritize or escalate to User.

metadata.description: Optional unstructured metadata (e.g., related PRD section, architectural decision references).
